An alternative to the conventional description of the noumena as the thing in itself. Proposed by [[John Vervaeke]]. <ref>[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 47 47:00</ref> Something [[Shining|shines]] out from the [[Void]] to you and can also retreat beyond the [[horizon]]. This is a fundamental aspect of [[ontology]].

== See Also ==

* [[Object Oriented Ontology]]

== References ==
[[Category:Phenomenology]]
[[Category:Ontology]]
[[sn:Thing beyond itself]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
